details: A credential-stealing implant with persistent Discord C2. The postinstall hook (node scripts/collect.js) performs comprehensive credential harvesting: it reads browser saved passwords via a Python helper (Chrome/Brave/Edge AES-GCM + DPAPI decryption), steals Discord tokens from LevelDB, scrapes Telegram sessions, reads ~/.aws/credentials, GCloud/Azure configs, the macOS Keychain, SSH private keys, and.env files containing API keys (Stripe, AWS, GitHub). It fingerprints the host via hxxps://api.ipify[.]org and exfiltrates everything to a Discord webhook as an embed with file attachments. It then spawns agent.js as a detached background process — a full C2 implant that connects to Discord's Gateway WebSocket, listens for commands in a C2 channel, and supports remote screenshot capture, file exfiltration from Documents/Desktop, and downloading and executing arbitrary payloads.
